statement: In every magma, Equation 2386 (`x = (y * (z * (y * y))) * y`) implies Equation 2512 (`x = (y * ((x * y) * z)) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0842
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op y y))) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op x y) z)) w)
